# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and performance** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 updates the bundled engine to Skia m151 and ships a wave of managed performance improvements. The release pulls in several upstream m151 bug-fix syncs and restores the CPU raster path. A broad set of hot-path allocations in colour conversion, SKShaper, and HarfBuzzSharp are eliminated. WebAssembly support is extended with Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries targeting .NET 11.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — The bundled renderer is aligned with Chrome milestone 151. Multiple upstream bug-fix syncs followed throughout the preview cycle. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294), [#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382), [#4443](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4443), [#4489](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4489))
- **CPU raster regression restored** — Re-enables SK_ENABLE_LEGACY_SHADERCONTEXT to fix a CPU raster path regression introduced by the m151 merge. ([#4428](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4428))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing optimised with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — Hex colour parsing is ported to a span-based path, eliminating allocations for callers that already have a span or string-sliced input. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **GRContextOptions no longer requires unsafe context** — The unnecessary `unsafe` modifier is removed from GRContextOptions, cleaning up the public API surface for callers in safe contexts. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## Bug Fixes

- **Native resource leak fixed in SKImage.FromEncodedData** — The overload accepting an SKRectI subset was leaking a native handle when the subset was applied. The handle is now disposed correctly. ([#3997](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3997))

## Lifecycle & Internals

- **Hot-path colour conversions ported to managed code** — SKColor↔SKColorF conversion and SKPMColor premultiply/unpremultiply are reimplemented in managed integer math, removing P/Invoke round-trips on every colour operation. ([#4370](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4370), [#4385](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4385))
- **SKShaper and HarfBuzzSharp interop allocations eliminated** — Glyph result buffers in SKShaper are read via zero-copy spans, HarfBuzzSharp.Buffer.AddUtf8 uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder, and SKFourByteTag/HarfBuzzSharp.Tag.Parse drop their per-call char[4] array. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388), [#4376](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4376), [#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396), [#4408](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4408))

## Platform

- **Emscripten 5.0.6 static libraries added for .NET 11 WASM** — Pre-built Emscripten 5.0.6 native libraries are included for .NET 11 WebAssembly targets, enabling the new exnref-based exception-handling ABI introduced in that toolchain. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459), [#4487](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4487), [#4488](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4488))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Eliminates per-call allocations in Buffer.AddUtf8 (pooled UTF-8 encoding) and Tag.Parse (char[4] array), and adds the Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM native libraries for HarfBuzzSharp.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | WebAssembly Skia build cleanup (dropping the duplicate SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM define), Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM libraries for .NET 11, and a cross-backend golden-image visual-regression test harness ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340), [#4459](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4459)) |

## Preview 2 (July 14, 2026)

Preview 2 added the Emscripten 5.0.6 WASM libraries, the managed colour-conversion and SKShaper performance ports, SKColor span overloads, the SKImage native-leak fix, and several upstream m151 bug-fix syncs.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.151.0-preview.1.1...v4.151.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 opened the 4.151 line with the Skia m151 engine update and the WebAssembly build-warning cleanup.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.1...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
